HTML template for displaying blog posts with options to create or edit posts if the user is logged in.

# Purpose
The content is a Jinja template used in a web application to render a blog page. It extends a base template, `base.html`, and defines blocks for the header and content sections. In the header block, it displays a title and a "New" post link if a user is logged in. The content block iterates over a list of posts, displaying each post's title, author, creation date, and body. If the logged-in user is the author of a post, an "Edit" link is provided. A horizontal rule separates posts unless the post is the last in the list.
